upasargachandrika.example_text: 'vyaBrAjetAM yaTA meGO saMsyUtO sUryaraSmiBiH' (BA0 droRa0 13625) saMsyUtO sambadDO
'sImA maryAdA visIvyati deSAviti' (ni0 1..3) (vizIvyatIti pARinIyAH) deSO vigatasantAnO karoti pfTak karotItyarTaH
'tasmintsarvARi yajYarUpARi nizyUtAni Bavanti' (Sa0 brA0 53520) nizyUtAni anusyUtAni sambadDAni anuzaktAni
'aBi SuklAni ca kfzRAni ca lomAni nizyUto Bavati' (rukmapASaH) (Sa0 brA0) nizyUto'nuvidDaH kftasIvanaH
'punarutsyUtaM vAsaH' (tE0 saM0 152) utsyUtaM CinnaM sat sUcItantuByAM syUtam saMhitacCidramityarTaH
